3189300.name: Ys X: Nordics - Art Book
3189300.description: The Ys X: Nordics - Art Book is a 44-page collection that immerses you in the rich world of the game. It features detailed character design illustrations of key characters, along with settings like the Obelia Gulf, the harbor town of Carnac, and the Sandras ship where Adol and Karja's adventure unfolds. The book also includes concept art of the mysterious undying creatures known as the Griegr, adorable chibi characters, and various other illustrations. Enhance your experience and delve deeper into the world of Ys X with this beautifully crafted art book.
